$comment: Schema upgrade for /vs/* pages — adds author, dateModified, reviewedBy, mainEntity Table. Backwards compatible with current comparisonPageSchema; just adds optional fields.

rendered_example.name: SealMetrics vs Google Analytics 360
rendered_example.description: Side-by-side comparison: SealMetrics enterprise analytics versus Google Analytics 360 (GA360) on data completeness, EU compliance, pricing and AI readiness.

mainEntity.about: Feature-by-feature comparison of SealMetrics vs Google Analytics 360

caller_changes:
All 10 vs/alternatives pages need `datePublished`, `dateModified`, and `author` props added. Pattern (per page):

  comparisonPageSchema({
    name: "...",
    description: "...",
    url: "/vs/ga360",
    competitor: { name: "...", url: "..." },
    datePublished: "2026-04-15",
    dateModified: "2026-05-04",  // bump on edits, OR auto-derive from git mtime via a per-page helper mirroring blog-modified.json
    author: { name: "Rafa Jiménez", url: "/authors/rafa-jimenez" },
  })

Long-term: add a sister script `scripts/build-vs-modified.mjs` that auto-populates dateModified per /vs page via git mtime (same pattern as blog-modified.json from Sprint 2).
